title: lychnis viscosa
intro: Lychnis viscosa, also known as sticky catchfly, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, thanks to its antioxidant and astringent properties. Lychnis viscosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
